name: golang-github-lib-pq-dev
title: golang-github-lib-pq-dev
summary: pure Go Postgres driver for Go’s database/sql package
description:
pure Go Postgres driver for Go’s database/sql package
After importing this package, you can connect to a Postgres database from your
Go programs. This package does not depend on libpq-dev and does not need cgo,
making it suitable for use when cross-compiling.
.
This package contains the source.
use_cases: When you need Kali Linux, use golang-github-lib-pq-dev because pure Go Postgres driver for Go’s database/sql package.
When the engagement is in the install phase, use golang-github-lib-pq-dev as a cataloged Kali Linux tool with operator ACCEPT/CANCEL gating.
When chaining Kali Linux tools, pair golang-github-lib-pq-dev with sibling catalog entries sharing its attack_surface/phase_hint.
When validating lab setup, run `golang-github-lib-pq-dev --help` (or the README entrypoint) and confirm required hardware/deps from the catalog.
